name: @mem-weave/mavis-plugin
description: Mavis (mavis) plugin for MemWeave. Auto-exposes 10 memory_* MCP tools, injects relevant memories on UserPromptSubmit + file-touching tool calls, and writes completed turns back to the server on Stop.

scripts.test:hook: npm run test:prompt-inject && npm run test:file-pack && npm run test:writeback
